title: 2級 模擬テスト6 リスニング第1部 (Kyoto) 1
prompt: 対話を聞いて、最後の発言に最も合う応答を一つ選んでください。
audioText:

B: Yes, although there were numerous people there.
A: I see. Would you recommend it to others?

title: 2級 模擬テスト6 読解 1
prompt: 対話を聞いて、最後の発言に最も合う応答を一つ選んでください。
passage: Recently, travel planning has become very popular in London. Since 1991, numerous residents gather on weekends. Nancy, the mayor, said that this activity helps build a strong community. In the future, the city plans to organize 217 more events related to travel planning.
choices: Because no one joined the events.
Because they want to make money.
Because it helps build a strong community.
explanation: grade2-06-reading-01: 読解の問題です。文脈と設問条件に最も合う選択肢を選びます。

title: 2級 模擬テスト6 長文空所補充 1
prompt:
次の英文の（　　　）に入れるのに最も適切なものを1, 2, 3, 4の中から一つ選びなさい。
[Mock 6-1]
